attributes.magic: PE32 executable (GUI) Intel 80386, for MS Windows

sigma_analysis_results.rule_author: Florian Roth (Nextron Systems), Tom U. @c_APT_ure (collection), oscd.community, Jonhnathan Ribeiro

sigma_analysis_results.rule_description: Detects the execution of a Windows system binary that is usually located in the system folder from an uncommon location.
sigma_analysis_results.rule_author: Florian Roth (Nextron Systems), Patrick Bareiss, Anton Kutepov, oscd.community, Nasreddine Bencherchali (Nextron Systems)

sigma_analysis_results.rule_title: Shadow Copies Deletion Using Operating Systems Utilities
sigma_analysis_results.rule_description: Shadow Copies deletion using operating systems utilities
sigma_analysis_results.rule_author: Florian Roth (Nextron Systems), Michael Haag, Teymur Kheirkhabarov, Daniil Yugoslavskiy, oscd.community, Andreas Hunkeler (@Karneades)

values.Description: Command Line Interface for Microsoft\xae Volume Shadow Copy Service

sigma_analysis_results.rule_description: Detects the deletion of a prefetch file which may indicate an attempt to destroy forensic evidence
Detects suspicious parent process for cmd.exe

sigma_analysis_results.rule_title: Hidden Executable In NTFS Alternate Data Stream
sigma_analysis_results.rule_description: Detects the creation of an ADS (Alternate Data Stream) that contains an executable by looking at a non-empty Imphash
Detects modification of autostart extensibility point (ASEP) in registry.
sigma_analysis_results.rule_author: Victor Sergeev, Daniil Yugoslavskiy, Gleb Sukhodolskiy, Timur Zinniatullin, oscd.community, Tim Shelton, frack113 (split)

sigma_analysis_results.rule_description: Detects suspicious file based on their extension being created in "C:\PerfLogs\". Note that this directory mostly contains ".etl" files

sigma_analysis_results.rule_title: Suspicious Copy From or To System Directory
sigma_analysis_results.rule_description:
Detects a suspicious copy operation that tries to copy a program from system (System32, SysWOW64, WinSxS) directories to another on disk.
Often used to move LOLBINs such as 'certutil' or 'desktopimgdownldr' to a different location with a different name in order to bypass detections based on locations.
sigma_analysis_results.rule_author: Florian Roth (Nextron Systems), Markus Neis, Tim Shelton (HAWK.IO), Nasreddine Bencherchali (Nextron Systems)

sigma_analysis_results.rule_title: Files With System Process Name In Unsuspected Locations
sigma_analysis_results.rule_description:
Detects the creation of an executable with a system process name in folders other than the system ones (System32, SysWOW64, etc.).
It is highly recommended to perform an initial baseline before using this rule in production.
sigma_analysis_results.rule_author: Sander Wiebing, Tim Shelton, Nasreddine Bencherchali (Nextron Systems)

sigma_analysis_results.rule_title: Remote Thread Creation In Uncommon Target Image
sigma_analysis_results.rule_description: Detects uncommon target processes for remote thread creation

Detects modification of the registry settings used for Internet Explorer and other Windows components that use these settings. An attacker can abuse this registry key to add a domain to the trusted sites Zone or insert javascript for persistence

crowdsourced_ids_results.rule_raw: alert tcp $HOME_NET any -> $EXTERNAL_NET $HTTP_PORTS ( msg:"MALWARE-CNC Win.Ransomware.Zeppelin outbound communication"; flow:to_server,established; http_header; content:"User-Agent: ZEPPELIN",fast_pattern,nocase; metadata:impact_flag red,policy balanced-ips drop,policy connectivity-ips drop,policy max-detect-ips drop,policy security-ips drop; service:http; reference:url,virustotal.com/gui/file/e22b5062cb5b02987ac32941ebd71872578e9be2b8c6f8679c30e1a84764dba7/; classtype:trojan-activity; sid:52451; rev:1; )

crowdsourced_ids_results.rule_msg: ET POLICY Geo Location IP info online service (geoiptool.com)
crowdsourced_ids_results.rule_raw: alert http $HOME_NET any -> $EXTERNAL_NET any (msg:"ET POLICY Geo Location IP info online service (geoiptool.com)"; flow:established,to_server; urilen:1; http.method; content:"GET"; http.host; content:"geoiptool.com"; endswith; reference:md5,04f02d7fea812ef78d2340015c5d768e; classtype:policy-violation; sid:2015500; rev:4; metadata:created_at 2012_07_21, updated_at 2020_04_22;)

crowdsourced_ids_results.rule_msg: ET POLICY IP Check Domain (iplogger .org in DNS Lookup)
crowdsourced_ids_results.rule_raw: alert dns $HOME_NET any -> any any (msg:"ET POLICY IP Check Domain (iplogger .org in DNS Lookup)"; dns.query; content:"iplogger.org"; endswith; classtype:policy-violation; sid:2035948; rev:4; metadata:created_at 2017_11_27, updated_at 2020_09_15;)

crowdsourced_ids_results.rule_msg: ET POLICY IP Check Domain (iplogger .org in TLS SNI)
crowdsourced_ids_results.rule_raw: alert tls $HOME_NET any -> $EXTERNAL_NET any (msg:"ET POLICY IP Check Domain (iplogger .org in TLS SNI)"; flow:established,to_server; tls.sni; content:"iplogger.org"; endswith; nocase; classtype:policy-violation; sid:2035949; rev:4; metadata:created_at 2017_11_27, updated_at 2020_09_15;)

crowdsourced_ids_results.rule_msg: ET INFO External IP Address Lookup Domain SSL Cert (geodatatool .com)
crowdsourced_ids_results.rule_raw: alert tls $EXTERNAL_NET any -> $HOME_NET any (msg:"ET INFO External IP Address Lookup Domain SSL Cert (geodatatool .com)"; flow:established,to_client; tls.cert_subject; content:"CN=geodatatool.com"; nocase; endswith; classtype:policy-violation; sid:2047865; rev:3; metadata:affected_product Any, attack_target Client_Endpoint, created_at 2020_10_27, deployment Perimeter, performance_impact Low, confidence High, signature_severity Informational, updated_at 2023_09_01, former_sid 2845167; target:dest_ip;)
